publish.title: 18,000 फीट पर जंग: India का Himalayan Defense Tech Shield 🏔️
publish.description:
अठारह हज़ार फीट की ऊँचाई पर, जहाँ साँस लेना मुश्किल है — India एक tech shield बना रहा है: swarm
drones, high-altitude UAVs, anti-drone grids और DRDO के laser weapons। गलवान 2020 के बाद, India का
जवाब जवानों की तादाद नहीं — technology है। पूरी कहानी।

Follow for daily geopolitics + defense, explained in Hinglish. 🇮🇳

Sources: Galwan 2020 (20 soldiers) · ~12 UAV platforms 2020 → 140+ by Mar 2026 · 100 swarm drones
(2023) · Archer-NG high-altitude UAV · MAPSS solar UAV (₹168cr, Jan 2026) · D4/SAKSHAM anti-drone ·
DRDO laser DEW (~2km) · Oct/Dec 2024 Eastern-Ladakh disengagement (Business Standard, The Tribune, ORF,
Organiser, Wikipedia).

Credits: News screenshots — The Tribune, ORF, Organiser, Wikipedia (editorial/fair-use, attributed) ·
Archival stills — Wikimedia Commons (Public Domain / GODL-India / CC) · Footage — Pexels · Music —
Kevin MacLeod, incompetech.com (CC-BY) · Map — Govt-of-India official boundary.
Disclaimer: A defense explainer; specific system capabilities are India's stated programs per public
reporting, not asserted battlefield fact. The 2024 disengagement eased the immediate standoff.
publish.credits: News: Tribune/ORF/Organiser/Wikipedia (fair-use) · Stills: Wikimedia · Footage: Pexels · Music: Kevin MacLeod CC-BY · Map: Govt-of-India
